TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Curtis_Borchardt, title = Curtis_Borchardt, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Curtis_Borchardt} }

S.FORM: Curtis Borchardt sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1980, byacing te 9 ru 13 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga New York, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 213 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 109 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2002 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Orlando Magic. qnxan nya hiya mzyu mari maki Eastlake High School . Curtis Borchardt mqaws beh Stanford krahu' pqwasan. 2002 kawas hiya sawn na hopa cuygal seto kwara Amerika koka. raral ga, bes nya (Susan King Borchardt) mzyu mari maki Stanford krahu' pqwasan. suruw lga, mzyu mari beh WNBA Minnesota Lynx. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Curtis Borchardt sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1980, byacing te 9 ru 13 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga New York, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 213 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 109 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2002 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Orlando Magic. qnxan nya hiya mzyu mari maki Eastlake High School . Curtis Borchardt mqaws beh Stanford krahu' pqwasan. 2002 kawas hiya sawn na hopa cuygal seto kwara Amerika koka. raral ga, bes nya (Susan King Borchardt) mzyu mari maki Stanford krahu' pqwasan. suruw lga, mzyu mari beh WNBA Minnesota Lynx. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ βorʦ~ʨħar*t s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa new jork, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu orlan*o maɣiʦ~ʨ. qnxan nja ħija mzju mari maki eas~ɕtlake ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool . ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ βorʦ~ʨħar*t mqaws~ɕ βeħ s~ɕtan*or* kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan. **** kawas~ɕ ħija s~ɕawn na ħopa ʦ~ʨujɣal s~ɕeto kwara amerika koka. raral ɣa, βes~ɕ nja (s~ɕus~ɕan kiŋ βorʦ~ʨħar*t) mzju mari maki s~ɕtan*or* kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan. s~ɕuruw lɣa, mzju mari βeħ wnβa minnes~ɕota ljnx. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
